name: Use of Semi-Generic Wine Designations

eligibility.description: Available for specific names like Champagne or Chianti if the user held a COLA for that brand name before March 10, 2006, and includes the actual appellation of origin.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the use of high-value geographic designations (e.g., Champagne, Port, Sherry) for wines not from those regions, provided specific labeling and Certificate of Label Approval (COLA) requirements are met.
